Package net.boricj.bft.omf.records

Class OmfRecordSegdef.Attributes

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.omf.records.OmfRecordSegdef.Attributes
Enclosing class:
OmfRecordSegdef
public static final class OmfRecordSegdef.Attributes extends Object
Segment attributes wrapper providing typed access to the attributes byte.

  • Method Details

    • ofRaw

      public static OmfRecordSegdef.Attributes ofRaw(int rawValue)
      Creates attributes from a raw byte value.
      Parameters:
      rawValue - the raw attributes byte
      Returns:
      the attributes object

    • of

      public static OmfRecordSegdef.Attributes of(OmfRecordSegdef.AlignmentCode alignment, OmfRecordSegdef.CombineCode combine, boolean bigSegment, boolean use32Bit)
      Creates attributes from individual components.
      Parameters:
      alignment - the alignment code
      combine - the combine code
      bigSegment - whether this is a big segment
      use32Bit - whether this uses 32-bit addressing
      Returns:
      the attributes object

    • getRawValue

      public int getRawValue()
      Returns the raw attributes byte value.
      Returns:
      the raw attributes value

    • getAlignmentCode

      public OmfRecordSegdef.AlignmentCode getAlignmentCode()
      Returns the alignment code.
      Returns:
      the decoded alignment code

    • getCombineCode

      public OmfRecordSegdef.CombineCode getCombineCode()
      Returns the combine code.
      Returns:
      the decoded combine code

    • isBigSegment

      public boolean isBigSegment()
      Returns whether this is a big segment.
      Returns:
      true if the segment is marked as big

    • isUse32Bit

      public boolean isUse32Bit()
      Returns whether this uses 32-bit addressing.
      Returns:
      true if 32-bit addressing is enabled
